title: taraxacum gibberum
intro: Taraxacum gibberum, also known as the alpine dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to offer various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and improving digestion, as well as supporting liver function and immune system health. Taraxacum gibberum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
